name: Exploitation Connector
description: Metasploit connector for controlled exploit-module execution.
long_description: Runs a selected Metasploit module in scripted mode for authorized exploitation validation workflows.
command_template: use {module}; set RHOSTS {target}; set PAYLOAD {payload}; run; exit

fields.label: Remote Host
fields.help: Enter the authorized target host or IP address that the selected Metasploit module will operate against.

fields.label: Metasploit Module
fields.help: Specify the Metasploit module path to execute, for example exploit/multi/handler.

fields.label: Payload
fields.help: Optional payload to use with the selected module. Ensure it is compatible with the chosen Metasploit module.

safety.consent_message: Metasploit can launch exploit payloads. Explicit authorization is mandatory.
